CIP.explanation: Morganella morganii carries resistance genes (Mmor_gyrB_FLO) from the fluoroquinolone resistant gyrB family/families. These confer resistance to Ciprofloxacin via antibiotic target alteration.

C.explanation: No specific resistance genes for Chloramphenicol were found in CARD for Morganella morganii. Resistance may be mediated by chromosomal mutations or mechanisms not yet catalogued.
